positive: A detailed, minimalist illustration of a stylized crescent moon cradling a group of various celestial elements: glowing planets, abstract nebulae swirls in pastel blues and purples, and delicate constellations formed by shining golden lines. The style is sophisticated 'art nouveau' mixed with modern geometric etching, featuring crisp, clean black linework contrasting sharply with soft, ethereal gradient washes. The composition should be perfectly centered, designed to look excellent as a repeating pattern or a single bold print on fabric. Focus on strong symmetry, clean negative space, and a harmonious balance of organic curves and sharp geometric edges. The overall mood is whimsical, cosmic, and dreamy. Print-ready, high contrast, vector quality.
negative: blurry, grain, fuzzy, noise, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, photorealistic, depth of field, out of focus, low detail, artifacts, multiple subjects, messy, busy background
